summary: Comprehensive testing of SEO meta tags, JSON-LD structured data, and updated Current Issue (8 articles). All 17 tests passed. SEO implementation verified via curl and Python tests. Frontend UI verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: SEO: Meta description tag present with JMLPH journal description
SEO: Meta keywords tag present with relevant terms (medicine, law, public health, etc.)
SEO: Meta author tag says 'ARETION Publishing Group'
SEO: Meta robots tag is 'index, follow'
SEO: Canonical link points to https://www.jmlph.net
SEO: All 7 Open Graph meta tags present (og:type, og:title, og:description, og:url, og:site_name, og:image, og:locale)
SEO: All 4 Twitter Card meta tags present (twitter:card, twitter:title, twitter:description, twitter:image)
Structured Data: 2 JSON-LD scripts present in page head
Structured Data: JSON-LD Periodical schema with JMLPH details, ISSN ['2788-791X', '2788-9815'], publisher ARETION Publishing Group
Structured Data: JSON-LD PublicationIssue schema with volume 6, issue 2, datePublished 2026-03-17
Browser tab title is 'ARETION Publishing Group'
Current Issue: Displays 8 article cards total
Current Issue: All 5 article categories present (Reviews, Law and Ethics, Commentary, Original Articles, Case Series)
Current Issue: All 8 article titles found and displayed correctly
All existing features working (header, metrics, contact, footer, policy modals)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All SEO features verified: meta description, keywords, author, robots, canonical link, 7 Open Graph tags, 4 Twitter Card tags, 2 JSON-LD schemas (Periodical with ISSN and publisher, PublicationIssue with Vol 6 No 2). Current Issue updated to 8 articles from Vol. 6 No. 2 (2026) Apr-Jun. All previous features (header, metrics, contact, footer, policy modals) still working.
